title: Summarizing Conference Talks
scenario: Read a conference talk's abstract (approx. 200-300 words) and a researcher's presentation slides (approx. 10-15 slides) and generate a concise 1-paragraph summary. The LLM should identify the main research question, key findings, and implications for the field. Assume the talk is on a technical topic and the slides are visually rich.
constraints: Must include the researcher's name and the title of the talk

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output meets all the constraints provided.
Evaluate the accuracy of the summary, including the main research question, key findings, and implications for the field.
Assess the use of technical vocabulary to accurately convey complex concepts.
Evaluate the formatting of the output, ensuring it is concise and clear.
